title: Check Query Plans Before Shipping
guidance: Schema and query changes should be verified with query plans before deployment
do: Run explain analyze or the equivalent before approving hot paths
dont: Do not ship blind query changes on production-size assumptions

title: Index Join and Policy Paths
guidance: Foreign keys and common access paths should be indexed to keep joins and RLS checks healthy
do: Index joins filters and policy lookup columns
dont: Do not rely on full scans for high-traffic relationships

title: Keep Migrations Reversible
guidance: Migrations should include a rollback path or a clearly documented safe reversal strategy
do: Plan forward and backward compatibility before applying schema changes
dont: Do not land irreversible schema changes without explicit approval

title: Avoid Table-Locking DDL in Production
guidance: Production-safe schema work should minimize lock duration and prefer concurrent patterns where available
do: Use concurrent index creation and staged rollout techniques
dont: Do not take large blocking locks on live tables unless explicitly planned
